creator: al16@mailbox.org
text:
Hi good morning.
I had the problem as well, thanks so much finding libfmt as the troublemaker.
I just upgraded libfmt to 11.1.4.
I only had to rebuild mariadb1011-client-10.11.11,  mariadb1011-server-10.11.11 (working since 11.10) and rspamd - this build and works fine so far.
Why not just split the port in libfmt-10 and libfmt-11?
